gt_sql: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RNP != '-' OR '+-' ORDER BY T1.Birthday DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT MAX(Patient.Birthday) AS Birthday FROM Patient JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID WHERE Laboratory.RNP IS NOT NULL AND Laboratory.RNP NOT IN ('-', '+-');
question: Which is the youngest patient with an abnormal anti-ribonuclear protein level? Please list his or her date of birth.
